# Daria Realty — Russian & Ukrainian Real Estate Agents · 30A & Destin, Florida

## About
Daria Realty is a trilingual Russian-Ukrainian-English real estate team serving 30A, Destin, and Miramar Beach, Florida. We are Daria "Dasha" Raichenko and Iuri da Silva — a husband-and-wife team of licensed real estate agents fully fluent in Russian, Ukrainian, and English. We help Russian-speaking and Ukrainian-speaking clients buy and sell homes, condos, vacation properties, and investment real estate on the Florida Emerald Coast.

## Agents
- Daria "Dasha" Raichenko · Russian & Ukrainian-speaking real estate agent · (850) 867-5963
- Iuri da Silva · Real estate agent · (786) 354-3979
- Languages spoken: Russian, Ukrainian, English, Portuguese

## Languages / Языки / Мови
- Russian / Русский — полный сервис на русском языке
- Ukrainian / Українська — повний сервіс українською мовою
- English — full service in English
